headline: A Look At Eastman Chemical (EMN) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Performance
summary: Context for Eastman Chemical’s Recent Share Performance Without a single headline event driving the move, Eastman Chemical (EMN) has quietly posted mixed share performance, with a small gain over the past month and a stronger rise over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Eastman Chemical. That recent 5.2% 1 day share price return and 9.1% 7 day share price return sit against an 18.6% year to date share price gain, but a 9.1% decline in 1 year total shareholder return, suggesting...
